name: Cultural Investment Holdings Co.,Ltd
summary: Cultural Investment Holdings Co., Ltd. engages in film and online game operations. The company is involved in the cinema film screenings and related derivatives business; investments in film and television production and distribution; the provision of entertainment brokerage and related services; and development and operation of online games. It also engages in the development, production, and sale of automobile bodies, and provision of other automobile production support services. The company was formerly known as Song Liao Automotive Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Cultural Investment Holdings Co., Ltd. in April 2016. Cultural Investment Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Shenyang, China.
